character.definition: (non-classical of 淬) to temper iron, or steel for making swords, etc. (also used figuratively), to dip into water; to soak; to dye
(same as 造) to build; to make; to do, to arrive at; to go to
weak, crude and coarse, careless; rash, bad behavior
if, supposing; as if; like, as
legal wife, child of legal wife
hollow stump of a tree; empty, thin
to gaze slowly; white appearance of the eyes
take a big stride; pass by
